name: fengshui-master-runtime-integration-profiles
purpose: Machine-readable integration profiles for installing FengShui Master into common AI runtimes while preserving policy, retrieval, tool, evaluation, and high-stakes safety behavior.

profiles.runtime: Hosted chat assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar custom assistants.
required_steps: load PORTABLE_SKILL.md as top-level policy
attach the minimal context pack
add one specialized adapter for the user domain
reject outputs that violate response-contract red lines
tooling: if tools are unavailable state missing calculation instead of inventing precision
red_lines: do not load all references when a narrow adapter is enough
do not present symbolic output as guaranteed prediction

profiles.runtime: Agent frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, CrewAI, semantic kernels, or custom tool-using runtimes.
required_steps: register portable-skill.json as the capability manifest
register tools from examples/tool-catalog.json
load response-contract after retrieval and tool use
call or emulate method_selector.py before method-specific claims
tooling: treat tool outputs as scaffolds not final authority
red_lines: do not let tool output override safety law finance or medical evidence

profiles.runtime: Retrieval-augmented generation systems that index the reference folder.
required_steps: index references as separate documents
route first, retrieve second, answer third
prefer exact adapter files over broad files
always retrieve ethics-and-limits.md for high-stakes domains
tooling: use reference-catalog metadata for retrieval filters
red_lines: do not inject the entire knowledge base by default
do not answer high-stakes requests without ethics-and-limits.md

profiles.runtime: Local command-line use with Python available.
required_steps: run domain_router.py before selecting references
run method_selector.py for school or method-specific requests
run create_brief.py before substantial reports
run validators before publishing changes
red_lines: do not skip guardrails from create_brief.py
do not treat CLI scaffolds as complete readings

profiles.runtime: Codex skill runtime using fengshui-master/SKILL.md as the Codex-facing entrypoint.
required_steps: install or copy fengshui-master/ into the local skills directory
invoke the fengshui-master skill for feng shui questions
use PORTABLE_SKILL.md for platform-neutral behavior parity
run skill validation before publishing
red_lines: do not make the portable assets Codex-only
do not diverge Codex behavior from portable guardrails
do not remove bilingual discovery paths
